visuals.title: Collection Interface Hierarchy
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Collection Interface Hierarchy
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Collection Classes and Implementations</text>

  <!-- Collection Interface -->
  <rect x="160" y="60" width="100" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Collection
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- List Interface -->
  <rect x="80" y="120" width="80" height="35" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="120" y="142" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    List
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Set Interface -->
  <rect x="180" y="120" width="80" height="35" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="220" y="142" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Set
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Queue Interface -->
  <rect x="280" y="120" width="80" height="35" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="320" y="142" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Queue
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- ArrayList Implementation -->
  <rect x="50" y="180" width="80" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="90" y="198" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    ArrayList
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- LinkedList Implementation -->
  <rect x="140" y="180" width="80" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="180" y="198" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    LinkedList
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- HashSet Implementation -->
  <rect x="230" y="180" width="80" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="270" y="198" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    HashSet
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- TreeSet Implementation -->
  <rect x="320" y="180" width="80" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="360" y="198" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    TreeSet
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- PriorityQueue Implementation -->
  <rect x="185" y="230" width="100" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="235" y="248" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    PriorityQueue
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Connection arrows -->
  <line x1="210" y1="100" x2="210" y2="120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <line x1="120" y1="155" x2="90" y2="180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <line x1="120" y1="155" x2="180" y2="180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <line x1="220" y1="155" x2="270" y2="180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <line x1="220" y1="155" x2="360" y2="180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <line x1="320" y1="155" x2="235" y2="230" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
</svg>

nodes.label: Each node has prev and next pointers
